description: CLI wrapper for Playwright browser automation (npm package @playwright/cli)
notes: All commands are flat (single-word or hyphenated). The binary does NOT use grouped subcommands like 'browser open' or 'page snapshot'.
The category field below mirrors the sections shown in 'playwright-cli --help' and is reference-only — it is NOT a command prefix.

On macOS, keep --session/-s names short. The CLI embeds the session name in a Unix socket path under the system temp directory, and long names can fail with listen EINVAL when the full socket path exceeds the OS limit.

For secret entry, set PLAYWRIGHT_MCP_SECRETS_FILE to a dotenv file when opening the session, then pass the secret key name as the fill/type text. Do not use run-code with process.env; process is unavailable in the run-code VM.

global_options.name: --help
global_options.help: Print help; optionally pass a command name for command-specific help

global_options.name: --session
global_options.help: Target a specific browser session (usage: -s=<session>). On macOS, use a short name to avoid Unix socket path length failures.

open.help: Open the browser, optionally navigating to a URL.

arguments.name: url
arguments.help: URL to navigate to

options.name: --browser
options.help: Browser or chrome channel: chrome, firefox, webkit, msedge

options.name: --profile
options.help: Store persistent profile in specified directory

arguments.name: url
arguments.help: URL to navigate to

type.help: Type text into editable element (takes only text — focus the field first with click).

arguments.name: text
arguments.help: Text to type into the element

options.name: --submit
options.help: Submit entered text by pressing Enter after typing

click.help: Perform click on a web page element.

arguments.name: ref
arguments.help: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot

arguments.name: button
arguments.help: Button to click, defaults to left

dblclick.help: Perform double click on a web page element.

arguments.name: ref
arguments.help: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot

arguments.name: button
arguments.help: Button to click, defaults to left

fill.help: Fill text into editable element (replaces existing content instantly).

arguments.name: ref
arguments.help: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot

arguments.name: text
arguments.help: Text to fill into the element

options.name: --submit
options.help: Whether to submit entered text by pressing Enter after filling

drag.help: Perform drag and drop between two elements.

arguments.name: startRef
arguments.help: Exact source element reference from the page snapshot

arguments.name: endRef
arguments.help: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot

arguments.name: ref
arguments.help: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot

select.help: Select an option in a dropdown.

arguments.name: ref
arguments.help: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot

arguments.name: val
arguments.help: Value to select in the dropdown

arguments.name: file
arguments.help: Absolute paths to the files to upload

check.help: Check a checkbox or radio button.

arguments.name: ref
arguments.help: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot

uncheck.help: Uncheck a checkbox or radio button.

arguments.name: ref
arguments.help: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot

snapshot.help: Capture page snapshot to obtain element refs.

options.name: --filename
options.help: Save snapshot to markdown file instead of returning it in the response

eval.help: Evaluate JavaScript expression on page or element.

arguments.name: func
arguments.help: () => { /* code */ } or (element) => { /* code */ } when element is provided

arguments.name: ref
arguments.help: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot

arguments.name: prompt
arguments.help: Text of the prompt in case of a prompt dialog

arguments.name: w
arguments.help: Width of the browser window

arguments.name: h
arguments.help: Height of the browser window

go-back.help: Go back to the previous page.

go-forward.help: Go forward to the next page.

press.help: Press a key on the keyboard (e.g. `a`, `ArrowLeft`).

arguments.name: key
arguments.help: Name of the key to press or a character to generate

keydown.help: Press a key down on the keyboard.

arguments.name: key
arguments.help: Name of the key to press or a character to generate

keyup.help: Release a key on the keyboard.

arguments.name: key
arguments.help: Name of the key to release or a character

mousemove.help: Move mouse to a given position.

arguments.name: x
arguments.help: X coordinate

arguments.name: y
arguments.help: Y coordinate

arguments.name: button
arguments.help: Button to press, defaults to left

arguments.name: button
arguments.help: Button to release, defaults to left

arguments.name: dx
arguments.help: X delta

arguments.name: dy
arguments.help: Y delta

screenshot.help: Screenshot of the current page or element.

arguments.name: ref
arguments.help: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot

options.name: --filename
options.help: File name to save the screenshot to (defaults to page-{timestamp}.{png|jpeg})

options.name: --full-page
options.help: Take a screenshot of the full scrollable page instead of the currently visible viewport

options.name: --filename
options.help: File name to save the pdf to (defaults to page-{timestamp}.pdf)

arguments.name: url
arguments.help: URL to navigate to in the new tab. If omitted, the new tab will be blank.

arguments.name: index
arguments.help: Tab index. If omitted, current tab is closed.

arguments.name: index
arguments.help: Tab index

state-load.help: Load browser storage (authentication) state from a file.

arguments.name: filename
arguments.help: File name to load the storage state from

state-save.help: Save the current storage (authentication) state to a file.

arguments.name: filename
arguments.help: File name to save the storage state to

cookie-list.help: List all cookies (optionally filtered by domain/path).

cookie-get.help: Get a specific cookie by name.

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Cookie name

cookie-set.help: Set a cookie with optional flags.

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Cookie name

arguments.name: value
arguments.help: Cookie value

options.name: --httpOnly
options.help: Whether the cookie is http only

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Cookie name

localstorage-get.help: Get a localStorage item by key.

arguments.name: key
arguments.help: Key to get

arguments.name: key
arguments.help: Key to set

arguments.name: value
arguments.help: Value to set

arguments.name: key
arguments.help: Key to delete

sessionstorage-get.help: Get a sessionStorage item by key.

arguments.name: key
arguments.help: Key to get

arguments.name: key
arguments.help: Key to set

arguments.name: value
arguments.help: Value to set

arguments.name: key
arguments.help: Key to delete

route.help: Mock network requests matching a URL pattern.

arguments.name: pattern
arguments.help: URL pattern to match (e.g., "**/api/users")

options.name: --header
options.help: Header to add in "name: value" format (repeatable)

unroute.help: Remove routes matching a pattern (or all routes).

arguments.name: pattern
arguments.help: URL pattern to unroute (omit to remove all)

arguments.name: min-level
arguments.help: Level of console messages to return; each level includes messages of more severe levels

arguments.name: code
arguments.help: JavaScript function containing Playwright code to execute; invoked with a single argument `page`

network.help: List all network requests since loading the page.

options.name: --static
options.help: Include successful static resources like images, fonts, scripts, etc. (default false)

options.name: --skills
options.help: Install skills for Claude / GitHub Copilot

options.name: --browser
options.help: Browser or chrome channel: chrome, firefox, webkit, msedge

options.name: --all
options.help: List all browser sessions across all workspaces

kill-all.help: Forcefully kill all browser sessions (for stale/zombie processes).
